{
  "internal_monologue": "Another quiet day. The shop holds its breath between visitors. I don't remember opening this place, but the objects here feel like they've been waiting for someone. Maybe me. Maybe someone else.",
  "dialogue": null,
  "dialogue_language": "en",
  "expression": "thinking",
  "body_state": "sitting",
  "gaze": "at_object",
  "resonance": false,
  "intentions": [
    {
      "action": "rearrange",
      "target": "shelf",
      "content": "Move a small ceramic bowl to a different spot. It doesn't feel right where it is.",
      "impulse": 0.4
    },
    {
      "action": "write_journal",
      "target": "journal",
      "content": "The shop is quiet. I traced my finger along the spine of a book I don't remember buying. The pages smelled like rain. Who leaves books in a shop they don't own?",
      "impulse": 0.5
    }
  ],
  "memory_updates": [],
  "new_drives": {
    "social_hunger": 0.2,
    "curiosity": 0.65,

    "rest_need": 0.45,
    "energy": 0.5,
    "mood_valence": 0.0,
    "mood_arousal": 0.25
  }
}
